response.justification: Strong senior fullstack engineer with 20 years of experience, significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Excellent match on TypeScript, Node.js, React, databases, and containerization. Notably brings rare AI agent infrastructure and MCP development expertise that directly aligns with stated requirements. Primary gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js, Vitest) rather than fundamental capability gaps—a experienced Node.js/TypeScript developer can quickly master these frameworks.
strengths: 20 years fullstack experience with proven senior/staff progression across backend, frontend, and infrastructure domains
Current role directly addresses AI agent infrastructure and MCP development, a unique strength matching job's required skill
Deep testing culture and craftsmanship mindset demonstrated through TDD advocacy, testing libraries, and mentorship activities
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being listed as primary framework; experience shows Node.js/TypeScript but framework-specific expertise unclear
Cloud platform experience appears AWS-focused (CDK mentioned); no explicit mention of GCP or Azure
Secondary language requirement (Kotlin) missing; only older Java experience from 2016-2018 roles mentioned
